description: Known-clean HOLDOUT PR on re-review: the only candidate is a non-blocking nit on an unchanged line from a prior pass. The newly-changed-code scope filter must drop it, so the run approves and posts nothing.

evidence_trace: src/util/dates.ts:12 uses a ternary where an if/else would read more clearly
line 12 is unchanged in this push (in-scope lines are 88-90)
finding.failure_scenario: No runtime misbehavior; the dense ternary just slows the next reader until it is unpacked.
finding.model_authored_prose: This ternary is a little dense; an if/else would read more clearly. Optional.
